payload.label: cabinet
payload.long_description: Dark brown wooden cabinet door with a single recessed rectangular panel and matte finish, showing faint scuff marks; right edge of the door is cropped by the image and the lower-left is partially occluded by a suitcase, appearing about 1.0 m from the camera.
